issue_title: Fix crash in lib/ui/blessed-xterm/blessed-xterm.js when m1 or m2 is undefined in _selection
issue_body_preview:
If `this._selection` is defined but `this._selection.m1` or `this._selection.m2` is undefined, it will crash on line 232 of `lib/ui/blessed-xterm/blessed-xterm.js`.

I found this issue when I was trying to use `lib/ui/blessed-xterm/blessed-xterm.js` in my own project when I drag mouse from one ble
test_description_zh: 在终端 UI 中，使用鼠标从一个 blessed-xterm 组件拖拽选择文本，尤其是从组件边界外开始拖拽或在选择区域未完全初始化时进行拖拽操作，观察是否能正常完成选择而不发生崩溃。
expected_result_zh: 在各种鼠标拖拽选择场景下（包括选择区域部分初始化的情况），blessed-xterm 组件应正常处理选择操作，不会因 _selection.m1 或 _selection.m2 未定义而崩溃，界面保持正常响应。
